title: stelis flacca
intro: Stelis flacca is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis flacca include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis flacca can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
